description: Sousa encourages Daisy to talk to Jiaying. Daisy tentatively reveals elements of her true connection with Jiaying, mentioning her time at Afterlife in the future and her own powers. Jiaying senses something familiar about Daisy, and the two share a heartfelt moment discussing Kora and their experiences as mothers and daughters. This emotional exchange deepens Daisy's internal conflict and foreshadows the coming tragedy.
